live_catalyst_narrative: The Core Narrative: Why This Setup Is a High-Probability Intraday LongThe 3x volume spike on the 15m chart with a bullish breakout is being driven by institutional accumulation into the ₹1,300 OI support wall, not retail FOMO.  The options chain shows a Put-Call Ratio of 0.681 (bearish sentiment) but critically, the Change in OI Ratio is 0.235 (< 1.0), which signals bullish short-covering and put writing, not call-writing bull traps.  This is the "WHY": smart money is using the ₹1,300 level as a springboard, writing puts to collect premium while accumulating shares, creating a self-reinforcing gamma squeeze higher.tradingview+2Synthesizing the Causal Chain1.
